audience_policies.source_phrase: Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date. Pricing: Free admission for up to 2 people. THIS PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO THE MORSE INSTITUTE LIBRARY BY 9:30AM THE DAY AFTER YOUR RESERVATION. OVERDUE FINES ARE $3/DA

coupon.source_phrase_block: Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date. Pricing: Free admission for up to 2 people. THIS PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO THE MORSE INSTITUTE LIBRARY BY 9:30AM THE DAY AFTER YOUR RESERVATION. OVERDUE FINES ARE $3/DAY. Passes can be returned at the circulation desk or the outside book drops.
